companyDescription.title: Company Description
companyDescription.text:
Do you want to shape beneficial technologies with your ideas?
Whether in mobility solutions, consumer goods, industrial technology, or energy and building technology – with us, you will have the chance to improve quality of life all across the globe.

As part of the Mobility Aftermarket division, you will work on product marketing, quality management, trade marketing, purchasing, and engineering to drive business excellence while collaborating closely with international teams.

Welcome to Bosch.

jobDescription.title: Job Description
jobDescription.text:
► Development of ETL/ELT pipelines primarily using Python
► Working with databases: data extraction, transformation, and loading
► Supporting development of data models and structured datasets for analytics and reporting
► Development and maintenance of Power BI dashboards and reports
► Assisting business users in understanding and visualizing data
► Documentation of data flows, logic, and processes
► Contributing to standardization of the analytics environment
► Collaboration with team members on data-related tasks and improvements

qualifications.title: Qualifications
qualifications.text:
► Basic knowledge of SQL (mandatory)
► Basic knowledge of Python (working with data – pandas, etc.)
► Understanding of data concepts (tables, joins, basic transformations)
► Familiarity with Power BI is a plus
► Familiarity with cloud/data platforms (e.g. Azure) is a plus
► Good English communication skills (written and spoken)
► Analytical thinking and problem-solving mindset
► Proactive attitude and willingness to learn

additionalInformation.title: Additional Information
additionalInformation.text:
Why you'll love to work with us:
► Experienced colleagues, international environment
► Being part of a great team will challenge you to grow personally and professionally
► Paid full time internship with flexible working hours so you can pass all the exams and be in track with faculty activities.

Are you our new colleague?

Get ready to work #LikeABosch! Simply complete the contact form and submit your CV in PDF format and in English.

If you have any questions, feel free to contact us at HRing.team@rs.bosch.com.
